importers."}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"agent-42\", author_id=\"alice\", author_type=\"human\")\n\n# Store with veracity confidence\nmem.remember(\"PostgreSQL migration completed.\", veracity=\"stated\")\n\n# Multi-agent channel recall\nresults = mem.recall(\"migration status\", channel_id=\"team-db\")\n\n# Tiered degradation runs automatically\nmem.sleep()  # consolidates + degrades old memories\n"}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Hermes Plugin"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["First-class Hermes integration with 15 tools: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_remember"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_recall"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_stats"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_triple_query"}],", and more."]}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-yaml","children":"# hermes.yaml\nplugins:\n  - name: mnemosyne-memory\n    source: pip\n    config:\n      data_dir: ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data\n      auto_context: true\n      context_injection:\n        enabled: true\n        max_memories: 5\n        min_relevance: 0.7\n"}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"MCP Server"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Connect from Claude Desktop, Cursor, or any MCP client:"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Add to claude_desktop_config.json\n{\n  \"mcpServers\": {\n    \"mnemosyne\": {\n      \"command\": \"mnemosyne\",\n      \"args\": [\"mcp\"]\n    }\n  }\n}\n"}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"For SSE transport (web clients):"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"mnemosyne mcp --transport sse --port 8080\n"}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"REST API (Legacy)"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["The FastAPI server embedded in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne/cli.py"}],".
